items.title: Crypto Biz: Stablecoin jitters meet institutional momentum
items.summary: Regulatory uncertainty shakes stablecoins as institutions push forward, prediction markets tighten rules and AI agents reshape micropayment economics.

items.title: Morgan Stanley enters bitcoin ETF race with market-leading low fee
items.summary: The bank priced its proposed spot bitcoin fund at 14 basis points, making it the lowest fund on the market, if approved.

items.title: P2P.me team discloses and apologizes for prediction market bets
items.summary: The P2P.me team opened positions on the Polymarket prediction platform to wager whether the project would hit its $6 million fundraising goal.

items.summary: Bitcoin and select major altcoins have turned down sharply, indicating that the bears are trying to take charge of the market.

items.title: Detroit set to enter Michigan‘s battle against Coinbase prediction markets
items.summary: The US city is expected to pen an amicus brief in Coinbase's lawsuit against the state of Michigan, which the exchange filed ahead of its prediction markets launch.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Anthropic's 'Most Capable' AI Model Claude Mythos Leaks, Deemed Major Cybersecurity Threat
items.summary: Anthropic's next-generation model, dubbed Claude Mythos, is seen as a "step change" for AI—and potentially bad news for cybersecurity.

items.title: NYSE Parent Company Finalizes Polymarket Investment, Totaling $1.6 Billion
items.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, the firm behind the New York Stock Exchange, invested a total of $1.6 billion into prediction market Polymarket.

items.title: US lawmakers publish crypto tax proposal without Bitcoin tax exemption
items.summary: The bill proposes exempting dollar-pegged stablecoins from gains or losses if the tokens remain tightly pegged to the underlying fiat currency.

items.summary: Bitcoin fell to its lowest price since March 2 on Friday as major crypto-related stocks like Strategy and BitMine suffered tougher losses.

items.title: Coinbase users push back against prediction markets notifications

items.title: Gavin Newsom Bans California Public Officials From Prediction Market Insider Trading

items.title: Why Mastercard paid double for stablecoin infrastructure it could have built

items.summary: Crypto cycles trap retail in speculation. Savings layers with capital preservation and prize incentives rewrite participation for consistent gains.
